DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE DATE REQUESTED NOV.28,2001 10:00 AM. $10.00 FEE PAID.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KLOCHKO, DEBORAH A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE FRIENDS OF PHOTOGRAPHY/RICH EDWARDS ACTING DIR $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
